steps.title: Locate the stated worry
steps.content: The passage says ecologists are worried because Pando's growth is declining, partly because animals graze on young trees.

steps.title: Match declining growth
steps.content: Choice B says young trees are no longer being produced, Choice C wrongly treats fences as obstacles, and Choice D invents a root-system limit. Declining growth means Pando is not growing at the same rate as before. The answer is A.
